center.name: 剛果雨林
center.summary: 剛果雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Bates's nightjar、Bates's sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Bates's nightjar (Caprimulgus batesi) or the forest nightjar, is a bird species of the family Caprimulgidae, native to the Congolian rainforests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Bates's sunbird (Cinnyris batesi) is a species of sunbird in the family Nectariniidae which occurs in Western African forests and Central African rainforests, and locally in other types of forest in Central Africa
